title: Cobblemon Marks
description: Cobblemon Marks is a Cobblemon side-mod that adds obtainable marks from the mainline games.
body:
### Cobblemon Marks is a Cobblemon side-mod that adds obtainable marks from the mainline games.

### Obtainable Marks

**Time-Based Marks**  
Pokémon caught at specific times — such as dusk, dawn, or midday — have a chance to receive **time-themed marks**, like:

*   🌅 **Dawn Mark** - For Pokémon caught at sunrise.
*   🥪 **Lunchtime Mark** For Pokémon caught at midday.
*   🌆 **Dusk Mark** - For Pokémon caught at sunset.
*   😴 **Sleepy-Time Mark** - For Pokémon caught late at night.

**Weather-Based Marks**  
Weather conditions at the time of capture influence marks, including:

*   ☔ **Rainy Mark** - For Pokémon caught during rain.
*   ⚡ **Stormy Mark** - For Pokémon caught in thunderstorms.
*   ❄️ **Snowy Mark** - For Pokémon caught in snowy biomes.

**Rarity Marks**  
Your Pokémon may also receive **rare or very rare marks** just by luck!

*   🎖️ **Uncommon Marks** (1 in 50 chance)
*   ⭐ **Rare Marks** (1 in 1000 chance)
*   ✨ **Very Rare Marks** (1 in 2800 chance)

**Ribbon Storage Integration:**  
Marks are stored as **ribbons** directly on the Pokémon!

I**ntegration with Cobblemon Transporter & Cobblemon Extra Data:**  
Marks can be viewed using Cobblemon Extra Data and Pokémon can be transferred with their marks to real games!
